name: The Veil Escalation
description: The signal at the Veil is destabilising. The Compact's task force has entered gate-less space to secure the Predecessor site. Bardo's research becomes a race. The third visit to the Veil is the one the crew will not be able to come back from unchanged.

arcs.summary: Bardo detects a phase shift in the Veil signal. The Compact begins moving assets into adjacent systems.
A Compact task force crosses into the Veil system via an unauthorised jump. The crew must choose sides.
The crew returns to the site. The signal is no longer a transmission. The signal is listening back.
